problem: Why can salamanders regenerate limbs but humans cannot — what gene pathway?
mechanism: mRNA therapy to upregulate/downregulate gene expression
hypothesis: If mRNA therapy to upregulate/downregulate gene expression is applied to what, then function improves will occur because the mechanism targets the root cause directly.

experiment.protocol: Mouse model knockout study with 34 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: What we observe is not nature itself but nature exposed to our method of questioning. — Heisenberg
